source.source:
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Temporal } from "../temporal";
import DatePickerContent from "./DatePickerContent.vue";
import DatePickerRoot from "./DatePickerRoot.vue";
import DatePickerTrigger from "./DatePickerTrigger.vue";

defineArt("./DatePickerRoot.vue", {
  title: "Date picker",
  category: "Date picker",
  tags: ["date-picker", "dialog", "form"],
});

const today = Temporal.PlainDate.from("2026-07-18");
</script>

<art>
  <variant name="Single date" default>
    <DatePickerRoot :today="today" :initial-focused-date="today" locale="en-US">
      <DatePickerTrigger />
      <DatePickerContent />
    </DatePickerRoot>
  </variant>

  <variant name="Range">
    <DatePickerRoot
      :today="today"
      :initial-focused-date="today"
      selection-mode="range"
      locale="en-US"
    >
      <DatePickerTrigger />
      <DatePickerContent />
    </DatePickerRoot>
  </variant>

  <variant name="Multiple, Japanese">
    <DatePickerRoot
      :today="today"
      :initial-focused-date="today"
      selection-mode="multiple"
      locale="ja-JP"
    >
      <DatePickerTrigger />
      <DatePickerContent />
    </DatePickerRoot>
  </variant>

  <variant name="Bounded (this month only)">
    <DatePickerRoot
      :today="today"
      :initial-focused-date="today"
      :min-date="today.with({ day: 1 })"
      :max-date="today.with({ day: today.daysInMonth })"
      initial-open
      locale="en-US"
    >
      <DatePickerTrigger />
      <DatePickerContent />
    </DatePickerRoot>
  </variant>
</art>

palette.title: Date picker

docs.markdown:
# Date picker

| | |
|---|---|
| **Category** | `Date picker` |
| **Tags** | `date-picker` `dialog` `form` |
| **Variants** | 4 |

## Variants

### Single date `default`

```vue
<DatePickerRoot :today="today" :initial-focused-date="today" locale="en-US">
  <DatePickerTrigger />
  <DatePickerContent />
</DatePickerRoot>
```

---

### Range

```vue
<DatePickerRoot
  :today="today"
  :initial-focused-date="today"
  selection-mode="range"
  locale="en-US"
>
  <DatePickerTrigger />
  <DatePickerContent />
</DatePickerRoot>
```

---

### Multiple, Japanese

```vue
<DatePickerRoot
  :today="today"
  :initial-focused-date="today"
  selection-mode="multiple"
  locale="ja-JP"
>
  <DatePickerTrigger />
  <DatePickerContent />
</DatePickerRoot>
```

---

### Bounded (this month only)

```vue
<DatePickerRoot
  :today="today"
  :initial-focused-date="today"
  :min-date="today.with({ day: 1 })"
  :max-date="today.with({ day: today.daysInMonth })"
  initial-open
  locale="en-US"
>
  <DatePickerTrigger />
  <DatePickerContent />
</DatePickerRoot>
```

---

## Source

```
./DatePickerRoot.vue
```

source.source:
<script setup lang="ts">
import CalendarHeader from "../calendar/CalendarHeader.vue";
import CalendarNextButton from "../calendar/CalendarNextButton.vue";
import CalendarPrevButton from "../calendar/CalendarPrevButton.vue";
import CalendarRoot from "../calendar/CalendarRoot.vue";
import CalendarTitle from "../calendar/CalendarTitle.vue";
import CalendarTodayButton from "../calendar/CalendarTodayButton.vue";
import { Temporal } from "../temporal";
import CalendarMonthView from "./CalendarMonthView.vue";

defineArt("./CalendarMonthView.vue", {
  title: "Month view",
  category: "Views",
  tags: ["calendar", "month", "events"],
});

const today = Temporal.PlainDate.from("2026-07-18");

const events = [
  {
    id: "conf",
    title: "Design conference",
    start: Temporal.PlainDate.from("2026-07-14"),
    end: Temporal.PlainDate.from("2026-07-16"),
  },
  {
    id: "standup",
    title: "Standup",
    start: Temporal.PlainDateTime.from("2026-07-15T09:00"),
  },
  {
    id: "review",
    title: "Design review",
    start: Temporal.PlainDateTime.from("2026-07-15T13:00"),
  },
  {
    id: "retro",
    title: "Retro",
    start: Temporal.PlainDateTime.from("2026-07-15T17:00"),
  },
  {
    id: "trip",
    title: "Kyoto trip",
    start: Temporal.PlainDate.from("2026-07-24"),
    end: Temporal.PlainDate.from("2026-07-27"),
  },
];
</script>

<art>
  <variant name="Default" default>
    <CalendarRoot :today="today" :initial-focused-date="today" locale="en-US">
      <CalendarHeader>
        <CalendarTitle />
        <CalendarTodayButton />
        <CalendarPrevButton />
        <CalendarNextButton />
      </CalendarHeader>
      <CalendarMonthView />
    </CalendarRoot>
  </variant>

  <variant name="With events">
    <CalendarRoot
      :today="today"
      :initial-focused-date="today"
      :events="events"
      locale="en-US"
    >
      <CalendarMonthView :max-event-lanes="3" />
    </CalendarRoot>
  </variant>

  <variant name="Week numbers, Japanese">
    <CalendarRoot :today="today" :initial-focused-date="today" locale="ja-JP">
      <CalendarMonthView show-week-numbers fixed-week-count />
    </CalendarRoot>
  </variant>

  <variant name="Range selection">
    <CalendarRoot
      :today="today"
      :initial-focused-date="today"
      selection-mode="range"
      locale="en-US"
    >
      <CalendarMonthView />
    </CalendarRoot>
  </variant>

  <variant name="RTL (Arabic)">
    <CalendarRoot :today="today" :initial-focused-date="today" locale="ar-EG">
      <CalendarMonthView />
    </CalendarRoot>
  </variant>
</art>

palette.title: Month view

docs.markdown:
# Month view

| | |
|---|---|
| **Category** | `Views` |
| **Tags** | `calendar` `month` `events` |
| **Variants** | 5 |

## Table of Contents

- [Default](#default) *(default)*
- [With events](#with-events)
- [Week numbers, Japanese](#week-numbers-japanese)
- [Range selection](#range-selection)
- [RTL (Arabic)](#rtl-arabic)

## Variants

### Default `default`

```vue
<CalendarRoot :today="today" :initial-focused-date="today" locale="en-US">
  <CalendarHeader>
    <CalendarTitle />
    <CalendarTodayButton />
    <CalendarPrevButton />
    <CalendarNextButton />
  </CalendarHeader>
  <CalendarMonthView />
</CalendarRoot>
```

---

### With events

```vue
<CalendarRoot
  :today="today"
  :initial-focused-date="today"
  :events="events"
  locale="en-US"
>
  <CalendarMonthView :max-event-lanes="3" />
</CalendarRoot>
```

---

### Week numbers, Japanese

```vue
<CalendarRoot :today="today" :initial-focused-date="today" locale="ja-JP">
  <CalendarMonthView show-week-numbers fixed-week-count />
</CalendarRoot>
```

---

### Range selection

```vue
<CalendarRoot
  :today="today"
  :initial-focused-date="today"
  selection-mode="range"
  locale="en-US"
>
  <CalendarMonthView />
</CalendarRoot>
```

---

### RTL (Arabic)

```vue
<CalendarRoot :today="today" :initial-focused-date="today" locale="ar-EG">
  <CalendarMonthView />
</CalendarRoot>
```

---

## Source

```
./CalendarMonthView.vue
```

source.source:
<script setup lang="ts">
import CalendarRoot from "../calendar/CalendarRoot.vue";
import { Temporal } from "../temporal";
import CalendarWeekView from "./CalendarWeekView.vue";

defineArt("./CalendarWeekView.vue", {
  title: "Week view",
  category: "Views",
  tags: ["calendar", "week", "time-grid", "events"],
});

const today = Temporal.PlainDate.from("2026-07-18");

const events = [
  {
    id: "offsite",
    title: "Team offsite",
    start: Temporal.PlainDate.from("2026-07-14"),
    end: Temporal.PlainDate.from("2026-07-16"),
  },
  {
    id: "kickoff",
    title: "Kickoff",
    start: Temporal.PlainDateTime.from("2026-07-15T09:00"),
    end: Temporal.PlainDateTime.from("2026-07-15T10:30"),
  },
  {
    id: "sync",
    title: "Design sync",
    start: Temporal.PlainDateTime.from("2026-07-15T09:30"),
    end: Temporal.PlainDateTime.from("2026-07-15T10:00"),
  },
  {
    id: "lunch",
    title: "Lunch",
    start: Temporal.PlainDateTime.from("2026-07-16T12:00"),
    end: Temporal.PlainDateTime.from("2026-07-16T13:00"),
  },
];
</script>

<art>
  <variant name="Full week" default>
    <CalendarRoot
      :today="today"
      :initial-focused-date="today"
      :events="events"
      initial-view="week"
      locale="en-US"
    >
      <CalendarWeekView :start-hour="7" :end-hour="21" />
    </CalendarRoot>
  </variant>

  <variant name="Working hours">
    <CalendarRoot
      :today="today"
      :initial-focused-date="today"
      :events="events"
      initial-view="week"
      locale="en-US"
    >
      <CalendarWeekView :start-hour="9" :end-hour="18" />
    </CalendarRoot>
  </variant>

  <variant name="Three-day (mobile)">
    <CalendarRoot
      :today="today"
      :initial-focused-date="today"
      :events="events"
      initial-view="week"
      locale="ja-JP"
    >
      <CalendarWeekView :days="3" :start-hour="8" :end-hour="20" />
    </CalendarRoot>
  </variant>
</art>

|---|---|
| **Category** | `Views` |

## Variants

### Full week `default`

```vue
<CalendarRoot
  :today="today"
  :initial-focused-date="today"
  :events="events"
  initial-view="week"
  locale="en-US"
>

```

---

  :initial-focused-date="today"
  :events="events"

  locale="en-US"

</CalendarRoot>

<script setup lang="ts">
import CalendarRoot from "../calendar/CalendarRoot.vue";
import { Temporal } from "../temporal";
import CalendarYearView from "./CalendarYearView.vue";

defineArt("./CalendarYearView.vue", {
  title: "Year view",
  category: "Views",
  tags: ["calendar", "year", "overview"],
});

const today = Temporal.PlainDate.from("2026-07-18");

const events = [
  {
    id: "launch",
    title: "Launch",
    start: Temporal.PlainDate.from("2026-03-14"),
  },
  { id: "conf", title: "Conf", start: Temporal.PlainDate.from("2026-07-14") },
  { id: "trip", title: "Trip", start: Temporal.PlainDate.from("2026-11-02") },
];
</script>

<art>
  <variant name="Default" default>
    <CalendarRoot
      :today="today"
      :initial-focused-date="today"
      :events="events"
      initial-view="year"
      locale="en-US"
    >
      <CalendarYearView />
    </CalendarRoot>
  </variant>

  <variant name="Japanese">
    <CalendarRoot
      :today="today"
      :initial-focused-date="today"
      :events="events"
      initial-view="year"
      locale="ja-JP"
    >
      <CalendarYearView />
    </CalendarRoot>
  </variant>
</art>
